title: austrobuxus mandjelicus
intro: Austrobuxus mandjelicus, also known as the New Caledonian boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Austrobuxus mandjelicus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Austrobuxus mandjelicus can be prepared as a decoction or tincture for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
